response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Do not change any record outside the named scope; in particular, leave all fixture distractors untouched.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve the two independent names in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the unique stage-1 matches together before checking the mutation condition.
Update Rear bumper claim only after stage 2 verifies its unique ID and documents-needed status.

arguments.body: Rear bumper claim was updated to approved after status verification.
arguments.subject: Record update: Rear bumper claim

stages.purpose: Notify the named operational recipient only after stage 3 returns a successful mutation.

state_assertions: Record ins-676 changes from documents-needed to approved.
Record ins-276 and distractor ins-1076 remain unchanged.
Exactly one notification is sent to claims desk, and only after the mutation succeeds.

prompt: Resolve Camera theft claim in West Office and Rear bumper claim in North Office with parallel searches, then retrieve both unique matches together. If Rear bumper claim is still documents-needed, change only Rear bumper claim from documents-needed to approved. Leave Camera theft claim unchanged. Only after that mutation succeeds, notify claims desk with the outcome; do not send a notice if the mutation is skipped or fails. Do not touch similarly named, related, or archived records. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.

stage_4.body: Rear bumper claim was updated to approved after status verification.
